creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
Hi J.R.,

- Add missing x11-fonts/fontconfig and libfreetype.so:print/freetype2 to LIB_DEPENDS
- Add cairo to USE_GNOME
- Remove duplicate pkgconfig from NLS_USES (pkgconfig is required irrespective of NLS)
- Remove a REINPLACE command since corresponding modifications were made upstream (between 1.12 and 1.13)
- Replace 'deprecated' [1] gettext  with more explicit gettext-runtime and gettext-tools 

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/uses-gettext-tools.html
